display_text: Clumsy Net, Tier N/A (Neutral Item): Active ability Ensnare targets an enemy unit and yourself for 1.75 seconds. This immobilizes both targets, acting as a self-rooting disable. The effect is dispellable. Useful for securing kills or interrupting channels when you can afford to be stationary. Stats: CD: 25s, Duration: 1.75s.
